ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the sub-category */,
  "parent_sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sub-category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_parent_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is verified */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the backer pledged to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the backer */,
  "pledged_amount" REAL /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "pledged_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the pledged amount */,
  "pledged_usd" REAL /* Pledged amount in USD */,
  "pledged_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pledge was made */,
  "backer_note" TEXT /* Note or message from the backer */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward the backer has claimed */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the backer */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "image_order" INTEGER /* Order in which images should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the video belongs to */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the video */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the video was uploaded */,
  "video_order" INTEGER /* Order in which videos should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the update belongs to */,
  "update_title" TEXT /* Title of the update */,
  "update_content" TEXT /* Content of the update */,
  "posted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update was posted */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update (e.g., status, new feature, milestone) */,
  "update_order" INTEGER /* Order in which updates should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the reward belongs to */,
  "reward_title" TEXT /* Title of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Amount required to receive the reward */,
  "reward_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the reward amount */,
  "reward_usd" REAL /* Reward amount in USD */,
  "reward_limit" INTEGER /* Total number of this reward available */,
  "reward_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of this reward remaining */,
  "reward_ships_to" TEXT /* Countries where the reward ships to */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the reward */,
  "reward_order" INTEGER /* Order in which rewards should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backer_rewards" (
  "backer_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer reward entry */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer who claimed the reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward claimed */,
  "claimed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reward was claimed */,
  "shipped_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reward was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipped reward */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backer_rewards_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backer_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "posted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was posted */,
  "comment_order" INTEGER /* Order in which comments should be displayed */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the like belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the project */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was liked */,
  "like_status" TEXT /* Status of the like (e.g., active, removed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, GBP) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., US Dollar, British Pound) */,
  "exchange_rate_to_usd" REAL /* Exchange rate to USD */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the exchange rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country (e.g., US, GB) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., United States, United Kingdom) */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used in the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the user */,
  "project_history" TEXT /* History of projects the user has created or backed */,
  "skills" TEXT /* List of skills the user has */,
  "interests" TEXT /* List of interests the user has */,
  "verified_badges" TEXT /* List of verified badges the user has earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being followed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following the project */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user followed the project */,
  "follower_status" TEXT /* Status of the follower (e.g., active, removed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
